editorialPromise: Explain the likely next filing step without overstating legal certainty.
routeGuardrails: Always distinguish no gas piping from no active gas service.
Use current DOB guidance before treating a timing note as final.
Hold district overlays as support-layer until demand proves they add value.
Treat one- and two-family exemptions as property-profile questions, not as loose building-type guesses.
Use the Cycle 2 district map and Follow Up #7 changes in all 2026 verdict flows.
currentFacts: Cycle 2 Sub-cycle C covers community districts 4, 6, 8, 9, and 16 in calendar year 2026.
Certification that a building has no gas piping is a one-time submission.
Documentation for a building with no active gas service is required every cycle.
The current rule text sets the civil penalty at $1500 for a 3-family building and $5000 for all other buildings.
